children.text: shall expedite the review by advisory councils under and by peer review groups under of applications for grants for research on such disease or disorder or proposals for contracts for such research;section 284a of this titlesection 289a of this title
shall exercise the authority in respecting public exigencies to waive the advertising requirements of such section in the case of proposals for contracts for such research;section 6101 of title 41
may provide administrative supplemental increases in existing grants and contracts to support new research relevant to such disease or disorder; and

shall disseminate, to health professionals and the public, information on the cause, prevention, and treatment of such disease or disorder that has been developed in research assisted under this section.
